history.subject: Hygiene: remove orphaned RationalCurveIso.{body,new,skeletal} chapter fragments from the project root (RR.4 effort never landed — no such Lean module or blueprint chapter exists; content recoverable from ledger history; twin copies remain in SubProjects/Albanese, out of this session's write scope)
Flattening stratification for a relative curve: ofCurve closed by instantiating the main theorem at pr_T (properness by base change)
QuotScheme: relocate Lane F affine-section chain below the union-merge substrate (order-safe, verbatim) so Stacks 01I8 machinery is available to it

Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin closed: pullback of a quasi-coherent sheaf along fromSpec is tilde of its V-sections, with the Sigma-pair unit identity (bijectivity of the base map via unit_leftAdjointUniq + restriction-unit components; iso via the now-live tilde-Gamma counit). QuotScheme sorries 12 -> 11
Blueprint: complete proof for lem:tildeIso_of_isQuasicoherent_isAffineOpen (Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin) matching the landed Lean proof; mark proof leanok

qcqs section localization (Stacks 01P0 beyond affine): Γ(M,W)→Γ(M,D(g)) is localization at powers g for quasi-coherent M on quasi-compact quasi-separated W, by Mayer–Vietoris induction on compact opens over the affine gap2 keystone

pushforward preserves quasi-coherence (Stacks 01XJ), axiom-clean: qcqs section localization feeds a converse fromTildeΓ transport at each affine of the base; closes the Lane F pushforward_isQuasicoherent pin (QuotScheme sorries 11→10)

blueprint: qcqs section localization (Stacks 01P0) + converse tilde-Gamma transport nodes; pushforward_isQuasicoherent (01XJ) proof rewritten to the real argument and marked proved; repairs the dangling lem:qcoh_section_localization_basicOpen ref

blueprint(01XJ): fix lem:pushforward_isQuasicoherent header — correct \lean pointer to AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.pushforward_isQuasicoherent (was a non-existent constant) and place the [title] as the lemma optional arg so it no longer renders as body; DAG now matches the axiom-clean Lean decl

Stacks 01HQ closed: pullback of tilde is tilde of base change, axiom-clean. Adjoint-uniqueness route: tilde-Gamma adjunction composed with pullback-pushforward vs extend-restrict scalars composed with tilde-Gamma, bridged by the global-sections identification pullbackTilde_gammaBridge; Sigma-pair section identity is unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app. QuotScheme sorries 10 -> 9; blueprint node lem:pullback_tildeIso proof leanok + new nodes lem:tilde_gamma_adjunction_mathlib, lem:pullbackTilde_gammaBridge
